query:
DELETE t1 FROM clientTasks t1
INNER JOIN clientTasks t2 
WHERE t1.clientId = t2.clientId 
  AND t1.taskName = t2.taskName 
  AND t1.id > t2.id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rf57goPWjFduX1.root --database dDLjqN8avGrS9FkSAJP3wb --execute DELETE t1 FROM clientTasks t1
INNER JOIN clientTasks t2 
WHERE t1.clientId = t2.clientId 
  AND t1.taskName = t2.taskName 
  AND t1.id > t2.id;
